name: analytics in main nav
description: Analytics entry is present in the main navigation header and replaces Plan.

name: navigate from codescene to analytics
description: Clicking the Analytics link in standard CodeScene opens the Analytics dashboard.

name: breadcrumb renders full path
description: Hierarchical breadcrumb shows the full path from root to the current area.

name: dashboard defaults to area root
description: On first load, the dashboard opens at the area root with last-week comparison.

name: breadcrumb ancestor navigation
description: Clicking an ancestor in the breadcrumb navigates back and refreshes KPI cards.

name: unassigned projects in tree
description: Projects not assigned to an area appear under a dedicated group in the area tree.

name: area explorer collapse and expand
description: Collapse all and expand all buttons toggle every node and preserve the selected area.

name: area explorer hierarchy
description: The full area hierarchy renders with correct parent-child relationships.

name: search areas and projects
description: Cmd+K search returns matching areas and projects and navigates on select.

name: open project button in header
description: Open project button with external link icon is visible and opens standard CodeScene in a new tab.

name: exploration dashboard loads four KPI cards
description: The Exploration dashboard loads Code Health, Hotspot Code Health, Code Coverage, and Hotspot Code Coverage without errors.

name: code health card
description: Code Health card shows a 0-10 score, status badge, and Quality tag.

name: hotspot code health card
description: Hotspot Code Health card shows a 0-10 score, status badge, and Quality tag.

name: code coverage card
description: Code Coverage card shows percentage, Below 80% badge when below threshold, and warning color.

name: hotspot code coverage card
description: Hotspot Code Coverage card shows percentage, Below 90% badge when below threshold, and warning color.

name: weekly delta on KPI cards
description: Every KPI card shows a delta value, directional arrow, and from last week label.

name: configuration warning notice
description: Cards display an accurate X of Y projects are missing configuration notice with a warning icon.

name: KPI area list sorted by score
description: KPI card area list is sorted by total score descending by default and is re-sortable.

name: view all opens full area list
description: View all link on a KPI card opens the full area list for that KPI.

name: leaf area hides sub-item list
description: Leaf areas display KPI cards without a sub-item list but still show score, status, and delta.

name: KPI cards update on area change
description: Navigating between areas refreshes all KPI cards and updates the breadcrumb.

name: child to parent aggregation
description: Parent area KPIs correctly aggregate child area values using configured weighting.

name: assign project to area
description: Assigning a project to an area includes its metrics in the area KPIs and removes it from unassigned.

name: dev tools hidden for non-admins
description: Dev Tools is not visible in the sidebar for non-admin users in production.

name: dev tools visible for admins
description: Dev Tools is visible and opens correctly for admin users.

name: dashboard sandbox for admins
description: Dashboard Sandbox entry is present under Dev Tools and opens for admin users.

name: user profile details
description: Profile menu displays the user initials, full name, and email.

name: codescene external link from profile
description: CodeScene external link in the profile menu opens standard CodeScene in a new tab.

name: log out redirects to login
description: Clicking Log out ends the session and redirects to the login page.

name: filter standard codescene by area
description: Project list in standard CodeScene can be filtered by an area defined in Analytics.

name: empty area state
description: An area with no projects renders a graceful empty state with guidance and no error.

name: unplanned work card
description: Unplanned Work card shows percentage, Above threshold badge when over limit, and warning color progress bar.

name: unplanned work weekly delta
description: Unplanned Work card displays weekly delta with directional arrow and from last week label.

name: KPI card info tooltip
description: Info icon next to each KPI card title shows a tooltip with the metric definition on hover.

name: sidebar navigation items
description: Left sidebar displays Analytics, Dev Tools, Quality, Productivity, and Organisation entries with correct active state.

name: sidebar collapse toggle
description: Analytics side panel can be collapsed and expanded via the toggle button and remembers state.

name: dashboards section in sidebar
description: Dashboards section in the side panel lists Exploration and can be collapsed via its chevron.

name: add dashboard button
description: Plus icon next to the breadcrumb opens the create dashboard flow.

name: theme toggle
description: Theme toggle in the sidebar footer switches between light and dark mode and persists across reloads.

name: area links navigate from KPI table
description: Clicking an area name in a KPI card table navigates to that area and refreshes the dashboard.

name: per-KPI configuration count
description: Configuration warning count is calculated independently per KPI card, reflecting only projects missing that metric's configuration.

name: query project metrics
description: Dashboard can query and display individual project-level metrics when navigated to a project.

name: open project link from analytics list
description: Listed projects inside Analytics provide a link to open the project view in standard CodeScene.

name: date range displayed in header
description: Header displays the current comparison window in DD MMM YYYY - DD MMM YYYY format reflecting the last 7 days.
